use_cases: Dramatic hero background for landing pages requiring atmospheric visual impact
Weather-themed hero sections for media and streaming platforms
Dynamic ambient backgrounds for gaming or creative portfolio sites
Storm-themed product showcases or campaign pages
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered rain and lightning animation system designed as a hero section background. Features customizable rain intensity, speed, color, and angle alongside lightning frequency, hue, and intensity controls. The component uses memoization and efficient canvas rendering for smooth performance across desktop and mobile platforms.
